summary: Implemented a non-blank Draft screen by adding a DraftWireframe page with loading/empty/error states and wiring it into routing and navigation. Updated global CSS theme tokens to a purple/white palette with dark-mode equivalents. However, the diff evidence is insufficient to confirm the theme is restored consistently across all screens and that hard-coded color overrides have been removed/avoided beyond the token update.

missing_requirements.requirement: Restore the app’s previous purple-and-white color theme across all screens (light + dark) and ensure no major UI surfaces/components rely on hard-coded colors overriding theme tokens.
missing_requirements.reason: The diff shows updated CSS theme tokens in index.css, but there’s no evidence of auditing/updating other pages/components to ensure they consistently use tokens (and do not use hard-coded colors that could keep the theme inconsistent across screens).
